events.event_title: Margherita Takes Eurostar London–Paris on Jul 7 2017 to Meet Epstein
events.description: Lesley Groff booked Eurostar ticket departing London St. Pancras at 16:31 arriving Paris Gare du Nord at 19:53 on July 7, 2017; Epstein's driver Valdson was to pick up Margherita after first collecting Epstein from Paris airport.
events.nexus_reasoning: Epstein's staff arranged travel for an associate coming to visit Epstein in Paris; Epstein himself was arriving separately.

evidence.excerpt: I have purchased your Eurostar Ticket! You will depart at 16:31 from London St. Pancras Int't to Paris Gare Du Nord Friday July 7th arriving 19:53.
